**What problem does this solve?**


**Proposed solution**


**Does this need a new provider interface or API endpoint?**
If yes, sketch the shape here (see `src/providers/types.ts` and
`docs/API.md` for the existing patterns) — provider/API shape changes
should be discussed before implementation.

**Which roadmap milestone does this belong to?**
See [ROADMAP.md](../../ROADMAP.md). If none fit, say so.

**Open source or closed source?**
See [docs/OPEN_CORE.md](../../docs/OPEN_CORE.md) — most features belong
here; features requiring shared/hosted infrastructure may belong in a
closed-source counterpart instead.
